name: ClientCare Billing Recovery
next_task: Add payer-specific commercial playbooks and deeper ERA/remit parsing so forecasts and appeal paths tighten beyond generic queue/action handling
current_focus: The Collections Control Center now has live backlog visibility, actionable ops overview, insurance verification preview, patient AR summary, assistant routing, controlled writeback for billing-status/provider-type/payment-status repair, payment-history import, underpayment queue, appeals queue, packet preview, and queued follow-up actions; next step is payer-specific commercial playbooks and deeper payment learning.
completion_checks: Collections Control Center auto-loads the live ClientCare backlog and KPI strip
Accounts Needing Action is filterable and account detail loads on click
Operations Assistant keeps running session history with archive behavior
Insurance verification preview returns take/review/do-not-schedule guidance
Patient AR summary shows aging buckets and top balances
Workflow playbooks can be invoked from the overlay and return actionable steps
Account Recovery Detail can preview/apply billing-status, provider-type, and payment-status repairs with save feedback
Payment-history import accepts paid claims / ERA / remit CSV and feeds reimbursement learning
Claims Ledger exposes an underpayment queue with short-pay amount and next action guidance
Claims Ledger exposes an appeals queue with playbook-based denial guidance
Underpayment and appeal queues can create tracked follow-up actions from the overlay
Forecasting improves from imported paid claims / ERAs / remits instead of rescue buckets alone
anti_drift_notes: This product has two data layers: the live ClientCare browser backlog and the local claim ledger. Do not assume the claim ledger reflects the live backlog unless imports have run. Keep the overlay fast by loading backlog summary first and account details lazily. Do not enable autonomous collections behavior; all outreach and writeback remains provider-directed and compliance-gated.

decision_debt.description: Forecast amount/date remains low-confidence until paid claims, ERAs, and remits are imported
ClientCare read paths are live, and controlled writeback now covers billing status, provider type, and payment status; insurer entry and payer-order changes still need payer-specific/manual handling
Capability queue exists to capture missing assistant behaviors until they are implemented natively
Appeals queue and packet preview now exist, and action queueing is live, but payer-specific appeal packets and playbooks still need deeper commercial-plan rules
